description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a striking tie-dye pattern in shades of purple, green, and black across the toe box and side panels. The shoe has a black upper with contrasting green stitching and a prominent mint green pull tab at the heel. The laces are lavender and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, threading through black eyelets. The midsole is a gradient of green and blue, with the outsole appearing in a solid blue tone. The ankle collar is padded and displays a moon-like gray and white texture, adding a unique visual element. The tongue features a small, stylized flower or star emblem in light blue.
description: A high-top sneaker with a purple, green, and black tie-dye pattern, mint green accents, and a moon-textured ankle collar. Features lavender laces, a blue sole, and a unique emblem on the tongue.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tie-dye toe box, lavender laces in a criss-cross pattern, and the emblem on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the moon-textured ankle collar, green stitching, and the gradient green-blue midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the mint green pull tab, padded collar, and the layered heel construction.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tie-dye pattern, moon-textured collar, and green stitching.
